mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow WHERE FOLLOWER_ID = #{followerId} AND FOLLOWING_ID = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE FOLLOWER_ID = #{followerId} AND FOLLOWING_ID = #{followingId}

SELECT m.ID AS id, m.NICKNAME AS nickname, m.PROFILE_IMG AS profileImg, m.FOLLOWER_COUNT AS followerCount, m.FOLLOWING_COUNT AS followingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe r WHERE r.WRITER_ID = m.ID) AS recipeCount FROM follow f JOIN member m ON f.FOLLOWING_ID = m.ID WHERE f.FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY m.FOLLOWER_COUNT DESC
